zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Colman於1420年7月1日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德時，他的父親Nicholas Coleman20歲，母親Alice Aldham20歲。他和Lady Agnes Norreys至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1457年2月3日在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可格亞特 瓦爾迪費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Colman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Mayo and Sligo) and English: variant of   Coleman  .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kohlmann   or   Kollmann  .
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Colman was born on 1 July 1420, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Coleman, was 20 and his mother, Alice Aldham, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Agnes Norreys. He died on 3 February 1457, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Colman est né le 1 juillet 1420, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Coleman, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Aldham, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Agnes Norreys. Il est décédé le 3 février 1457, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Colman am 1. Juli 1420 in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Coleman 20 und seine Mutter Alice Aldham 20. Er hatte mit Lady Agnes Norreys mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Februar 1457 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Colmanが1420年7月1日にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで生まれた時，父Nicholas Colemanは20歳，母Alice Aldhamは20歳であった。彼はLady Agnes Norreysとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1457年2月3日に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクグレアト ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Colman(이)가 1420년 7월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Coleman(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Aldham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Lady Agnes Norreys(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 2월 3일 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 그리트 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Colman родился 1 июля 1420 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Coleman было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Aldham, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Agnes Norreys. Он умер 3 февраля 1457 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности грит валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.
